Human Genome Issue HG-2104

Summary:
Possible misassembly or indel variation in GRCh38 within AL390242.17
Description:
Analysis of GU268168.1 along with alignment of HuRef Chr. 1, suggest there may be ~1,834 bp sequence missing from the reference assembly within component AL390242.17. This may represent variation or an assembly error.
Status:
Resolved (GRC Resolved by Electronic Means)
Type:
Clone Problem
Last updated:
2024-04-12
Affects version:
GRCh38
Fix version:
GRCh38.p1, GRCh39
Resolution:
AL390242.17 has been updated to AL390242.18 in order to include the ~1, 834bp found to be missing from AL390242.17.

Patches and alternate loci

Scaffold type:
FIX patch to GRCh38
Comment:
This sequence will be incorporated into the reference assembly in the next major assembly release. At that time, the accession number for this patch will be made secondary to the reference chromosome accession. The accession for AL390242.17 has been updated to AL390242.18 in order to include the approximately 1,834bp found to be missing from AL390242.17.
Revision history of patches and alts for HG-2104
Assembly Scaffold type Contig name GenBank accession RefSeq accession Region
GRCh38.p1 FIX HG2104_PATCH KN196474.1 NW_009646196.1 REGION190
